title: Admission statement about God-given purpose
description: Create an admission statement about God-given purpose to guide decisions, priorities, and time.
full_idea: Remember that I need to create admission statement about my purpose that has been given to me by God this mission statement needs to be my compass for making decisions for prioritizing things and for spending my time. I need to look into the people that I respect the most and how they formulate their mission statements the companies I expired to emulate, and see how they construct their representation statements how specific, what it entails, etc.
source_text: Remember that I need to create admission statement about my purpose that has been given to me by God this mission statement needs to be my compass for making decisions for prioritizing things and for spending my time.
